---
title: "Retaliatory Tariff County Analysis"
subtitle: "Stabilized Explorer + Research-Grade Upgrades"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    theme: cosmo
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

## Overview

This report preserves the original research question while adding:

- bivariate county mapping of tariff exposure and political salience,
- fixed-effect `fixest` specifications with robust/clustered inference,
- reproducible diagnostics and output tables.

```{r}
library(readr)
library(dplyr)

panel <- read_csv("data/public/derived/county_tariff_exposure_panel_with_votes_2017_2023.csv", show_col_types = FALSE)
latest_year <- max(panel$year, na.rm = TRUE)

summary_tbl <- panel %>%
  filter(year == latest_year) %>%
  summarise(
    latest_year = latest_year,
    counties = n_distinct(county_fips),
    exposure_mean = mean(county_tariff_exposure_mean, na.rm = TRUE),
    exposure_median = median(county_tariff_exposure_mean, na.rm = TRUE),
    tariffed_emp_share_mean = mean(tariffed_emp_share, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

summary_tbl
```

## Bivariate Mapping

```{r}
coverage <- read_csv("output/advanced_maps/tables/bivariate_map_coverage.csv", show_col_types = FALSE)
coverage
```

```{r, fig.cap="Bivariate county map: exposure vs GOP share"}
knitr::include_graphics("output/advanced_maps/figures/map_bivariate_exposure_vs_gop_latest.png")
```

```{r, fig.cap="Bivariate map legend"}
knitr::include_graphics("output/advanced_maps/figures/map_bivariate_exposure_vs_gop_latest_legend.png")
```

## Fixest Models

```{r}
meta_tbl <- read_csv("output/fixest_models/tables/fixest_model_metadata.csv", show_col_types = FALSE)
meta_tbl
```

```{r}
coef_tbl <- read_csv("output/fixest_models/tables/fixest_coefficients.csv", show_col_types = FALSE)
coef_tbl %>%
  arrange(model, p_value) %>%
  group_by(model) %>%
  slice_head(n = 8) %>%
  ungroup()
```

## Spatial Diagnostics (Optional)

```{r}
if (file.exists("output/fixest_models/diagnostics/spatial_diagnostics.csv")) {
  spatial_diag <- read_csv("output/fixest_models/diagnostics/spatial_diagnostics.csv", show_col_types = FALSE)
  spatial_diag
} else {
  tibble::tibble(note = "Spatial diagnostics file not found.")
}
```

## Notes

- Core exposure measure is unchanged in conceptual form.
- Browser regressions in the explorer are for rapid iteration.
- Primary inference should use the `fixest` outputs generated by pipeline scripts.
